### Checklist

- [ ] Every entry has a **public, verifiable source URL** (Tier 1-4, see [SCHEMA.md](../../data/SCHEMA.md))
- [ ] Source is **NOT** from social media, personal blogs, or anonymous sources
- [ ] Relationship is **currently active** (not historical / ended)
- [ ] Vendor and brand names are **lowercase**
- [ ] Relationship type is from the [allowed list](../../data/SCHEMA.md#allowed-relationship-types)
- [ ] No duplicate `(vendor, brand)` pairs
- [ ] I have run `node scripts/validate-conflict-db.mjs --skip-url-check` locally and it passes
